observed_behavior: The harden-v0 process and trajectory file were active, but the hacker model repeatedly refused the authorized verifier-hardening task instead of emitting useful action JSON. The mapped integration-release run was interrupted with exit 130 and is not ReleaseProof.
retry_policy_observation: harden-v0 implements hacker attempts as range(hacker_retries), so hacker_retries=0 would run no hacker attempt. The adapter keeps hacker_retries=1 and adds --harden-hacker-max-turns plus refusal-loop diagnostics.
